channel.title: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page
channel.description: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Membrane? Gone In Seconds!
item.description: Learn a quick trick to remove the tough membrane from meat for perfect grilling. Simple BBQ tip for tender, flavorful results every time.

media:content.media:title: Membrane? Gone In Seconds!
media:content.media:description: Learn a quick trick to remove the tough membrane from meat for perfect grilling. Simple BBQ tip for tender, flavorful results every time.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Restaurant-Style Gumbo At Home
item.description: A rich, flavorful seafood gumbo recipe with classic Creole spices. Bring restaurant-quality taste to your own kitchen with this easy guide.

media:content.media:title: Restaurant-Style Gumbo At Home
media:content.media:description: A rich, flavorful seafood gumbo recipe with classic Creole spices. Bring restaurant-quality taste to your own kitchen with this easy guide.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Bacon Makes Everything Better
item.description: Crispy bacon adds flavor and crunch to any dish. Simple tips for cooking and incorporating bacon into quick, tasty meals.

media:content.media:title: Bacon Makes Everything Better
media:content.media:description: Crispy bacon adds flavor and crunch to any dish. Simple tips for cooking and incorporating bacon into quick, tasty meals.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Beans, Spices, And Everything Nice
item.description: A hearty Southern recipe featuring beans simmered with savory spices. Perfect for meal prep or a flavorful side dish at any meal.

media:content.media:title: Beans, Spices, And Everything Nice
media:content.media:description: A hearty Southern recipe featuring beans simmered with savory spices. Perfect for meal prep or a flavorful side dish at any meal.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Chicken & Sausage Jambalaya Magic!
item.description: A flavorful Creole jambalaya with tender chicken, savory sausage, and aromatic spices. Perfect for a hearty, home-cooked meal.

media:content.media:title: Chicken & Sausage Jambalaya Magic!
media:content.media:description: A flavorful Creole jambalaya with tender chicken, savory sausage, and aromatic spices. Perfect for a hearty, home-cooked meal.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Looking for an easy dinner to start the week?
item.description: Quick and simple recipes to kick off the week. Delicious meals that save time without compromising on flavor.

media:content.media:title: Looking for an easy dinner to start the week?
media:content.media:description: Quick and simple recipes to kick off the week. Delicious meals that save time without compromising on flavor.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Butter, Garlic, Cream… Let’s Go!
item.description: A rich and comforting pasta with butter, garlic, and cream. Easy to make and packed with flavor for a satisfying homemade meal.

media:content.media:title: Butter, Garlic, Cream… Let’s Go!
media:content.media:description: A rich and comforting pasta with butter, garlic, and cream. Easy to make and packed with flavor for a satisfying homemade meal.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page

item.title: Chicken and Sausage Bowtie Pasta
item.description: A hearty pasta dish with tender chicken, savory sausage, and bowtie noodles tossed in a flavorful sauce. Perfect for a satisfying weeknight meal.

media:content.media:title: Chicken and Sausage Bowtie Pasta
media:content.media:description: A hearty pasta dish with tender chicken, savory sausage, and bowtie noodles tossed in a flavorful sauce. Perfect for a satisfying weeknight meal.
media:content.media:credit: Smokin' and Grillin' with AB Page
